title: Jotunheimr
description: Embark on a Nordic adventure with your friends — a world of mystery, survival, and discovery inspired by a legendary Minecraft tale.
body:
# Jotunheimr — A Nordic Survival & Exploration
Step into the frozen wilds with your friends — a Nordic survival adventure where exploration, creativity, and teamwork define your journey.

🌲 Explore
Traverse rugged snow-clad peaks, ancient forests, and icy caves hiding untold secrets. Every path may lead to a forgotten temple, a hidden valley, or an underground river flowing into the unknown.

❄️ Survive
Gather scarce resources, craft cold-resistant gear, and build shelters to withstand fierce blizzards and avalanches. Face wild creatures that roam under the northern lights and storms that challenge your every step.

🏰 Build & Create
From mighty fortresses to suspension bridges, tunnels, traps, and hidden bases — your creativity shapes the world. Team up with friends to design structures that defy the harsh elements.

🔄 Evolving with Minecraft
This modpack is built to adapt and grow alongside future Minecraft versions. Expect fresh content, new mechanics, and continued compatibility as the game evolves.

🎯 Why Jotunheimr?

A balanced mix of survival + exploration + building gameplay

Unique Nordic biomes, mysterious structures, and seasonal mechanics

Multiplayer-first experience with opportunities for cooperation and strategy

A world that keeps revealing surprises — never the same adventure twice

Ready to brave the frost?
Join the journey: download now, invite your friends, and uncover what lies beyond the ice.
